name: Lendmark Financial Services LLC
description_short: Lendmark Financial Services LLC Virginia Beach, Virginia — Lendmark Financial Services is a consumer finance company offering personal loans, auto finan...
description_long:
Lendmark Financial Services LLC is a consumer finance company with a branch network spanning multiple states, including this Charlotte, NC location at 3220 Wilkinson Blvd. The company has grown partly through acquisition, as evidenced by a banner welcoming former Century Finance customers to its platform. Lendmark positions itself as a relationship-driven lender focused on personalized service rather than a purely digital experience.

Lendmark offers three core loan products: personal loans with fixed rates and scheduled payments for purposes such as weddings, vacations, or unexpected expenses; auto financing for new and used vehicles as well as refinancing existing auto loans; and debt consolidation loans designed to roll multiple high-rate bills into one lower monthly payment. The company also offers credit insurance as an optional add-on and provides retail merchant sales finance services for business partners.

Lendmark differentiates itself on same-day funding, fixed interest rates, and local branch relationships. The application process allows borrowers to start online or walk into a branch, and upon approval, visit the branch to finalize the loan and receive funds. The company emphasizes that its loan experts understand borrowers want to work with people who genuinely care, and the branch model supports that hands-on approach.

The most significant limitation is a lack of rate transparency: no APR ranges or loan amount limits are disclosed on the website, making it impossible to compare costs before applying. Branch hours are weekdays only (8:30am–5:30pm Mon–Fri), with no weekend availability. Loan finalization requires an in-person branch visit, so the process is not fully digital. As a consumer finance company that typically serves near-prime and non-prime borrowers, rates may be materially higher than what a bank or credit union would offer a prime-credit applicant.

As a financial institution, this lender competes with both traditional banks and newer fintech personal loan lenders in the consumer lending space. Borrowers seeking personal loans for bad credit may find more flexible terms through online lenders, while those focused on simplifying payments may benefit from debt consolidation loans with fixed rates. For credit building, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured paths to improvement. Credit monitoring services provide ongoing visibility into credit health, and credit counseling through nonprofit agencies can help consumers create sustainable budgeting plans. Many of these lenders offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments over 12 to 60 months, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
address: 4725 Virginia Beach Blvd #160, Virginia Beach, VA 23462

company_info.headquarters: 4725 Virginia Beach Blvd #160, Virginia Beach, VA 23462

pros: Same-day funding available upon loan approval
Fixed interest rates provide predictable, budget-friendly monthly payments
In-branch loan experts offer personalized, face-to-face service
Pre-qualification check available before submitting a full application
Multiple loan types offered at one location: personal, auto, and debt consolidation
Flexible payment options including an online payment portal via ACI Payments
Auto financing includes new purchases, used vehicles, and refinancing existing loans
cons: No APR ranges or loan amount limits disclosed on the website — rate transparency is absent before applying
Branch hours are weekdays only (8:30am–5:30pm Mon–Fri); closed Saturday and Sunday
Loan finalization must be completed in person at a branch — not a fully online process
Credit insurance is an optional add-on that increases total loan cost if accepted
Consumer finance positioning suggests rates may be higher than bank or credit union alternatives for well-qualified borrowers
best_for: Borrowers who prefer in-person service and a local lending relationship over a fully digital experience
People consolidating multiple high-rate debts into a single fixed monthly payment
Auto buyers who want pre-approved financing with a fixed rate before visiting a dealership
Near-prime borrowers who may not qualify for the lowest rates at a traditional bank or credit union
diagnosis: Lendmark is best for borrowers who want a fixed-rate personal, auto, or debt consolidation loan and value in-person guidance at a local branch. The main caveat is that rates and loan limits are not disclosed publicly, so true cost comparison requires applying or visiting a branch first — a meaningful hurdle for rate-shopping consumers.
services: Personal loans with fixed interest rates
